analysis_window.notes: Default analysis scope begins when structured race preparation started.

data_collection_protocol: Record every ride on the Garmin when possible.
Keep wearing the Apple Watch for sleep, HRV, resting HR, and general recovery metrics.
Use Apple Health as a recovery and secondary workout source, not as the primary bike-analysis source when Garmin FIT files exist.

lab_profiles.source: Dr. Max Testa / Intermountain Sports Medicine Park City Hospital
notes: Use this lab profile as the current physiological baseline.
Treat threshold differently on flats versus climbing/altitude.
The training zone table is coaching guidance; the summary box contains anchor values from the test sheet.

race_goals.name: Silver Rush 50 MTB
race_goals.terrain: Mainly fire roads with limited singletrack.
goal_notes: High-altitude climbing durability is the main limiter.
Need sustainable power and pacing for a 6-7 hour effort.

race_goals.name: Park City Point 2 Point
race_goals.terrain: About 99% singletrack on Park City trails.

prior_result.notes: Late-August Garmin ride should reflect this event effort.

goal_notes: Need much better long-duration durability, climbing repeatability, and technical-trail pacing than last year.

analysis_rules: Treat the 2026-03-18 Dr. Testa lactate test as the authoritative baseline until superseded by a newer lab test.
When classifying threshold work, distinguish between flat threshold and climbing/altitude threshold.
Use Garmin FIT data for record-level bike analysis whenever available.
Use Apple Health for readiness, sleep, HRV, resting heart rate, and as a secondary ride source when Garmin data is missing.
Default analysis scope begins on 2025-07-01 unless the user explicitly asks for earlier history.
open_inputs_needed: Detailed Dr. Testa workout prescriptions for Park City and Memphis
Typical weekly availability for riding and gym sessions
Any injuries, mobility limitations, or strength-training restrictions
Exact Memphis bike sensor setup once cadence and/or power sensors are added
